# Kautilyan AI

> Kautilyan helps growing Indian businesses identify, redesign, and implement high-value AI workflows on existing systems - one workflow, one metric, proof before scale.

Kautilyan is an AI workflow transformation partner (not a generic SaaS platform). Engagements start with a free 45-minute AI Workflow Diagnosis, then a scoped Proof of Value Blueprint and a 45-day pilot with a named outcome guaranteed in writing.

## What we do

- Diagnose which operational workflow is breaking and why
- Redesign the workflow for the AI era (not just automate the old one)
- Implement governed AI agents on existing systems (ERP, CRM, WhatsApp, Excel, etc.)
- Prove measurable value in ~45 days before scaling

## How we work

1. **Stage 0 - Free AI Workflow Diagnosis:** 45-minute session, written output, no commitment.
2. **Stage 1 - Proof of Value Blueprint:** Deep-dive workflow analysis, future-state design, named success metric (credited against pilot).
3. **Stage 2 - 45-day pilot:** One workflow, one named outcome, refund guarantee if outcome is missed after client dependencies are met.
4. **Stage 3 - Kautilyan Intelligence Layer:** Institutionalise what works at scale.

## Key principles

- Agent proposes. Human approves. Organisation learns.
- BYOK - clients bring own API keys; read-only access, data minimisation, no model training on client data.
- Platform after proof - no platform commitment before the first workflow proves value.
- **SLOPE Framework:** Start Small, Leverage Right Tools, Own Your Data, Powered Experiments, Evaluate Always.

## Who we work with

Growing businesses with operational complexity - D2C brands, ecommerce operators, manufacturers, distributors, B2B services, logistics, healthcare - with existing systems, an AI mandate, and no clear implementation path.
